title: Ramipril: MedlinePlus Drug Information
text:
doctor will probably start you on a low dose of ramipril and gradually increase your dose.
Ramipril controls high blood pressure and heart failure but does not cure them. Continue to take ramipril even if you feel well. Do not stop taking ramipril without talking to your doctor.
Other uses for this medicine 
This medication may be prescribed for other uses; ask your doctor or pharmacist for more information.
What special precautions should I follow? 
Before taking ramipril, tell your doctor or pharmacist if you are allergic to this drug, any part of this drug, or any other drugs, foods or substances. Tell your doctor or pharmacist about the allergy and what symptoms you had. tell your doctor or pharmacist if you are taking valsartan and sacubitril (Entresto Â® ) or if you have stopped taking it within the last 36 hours. Your doctor will probably tell you not to take ramipril.Â  some medications should not be taken with ramipril. Other medications may cause dosing changes or extra monitoring when taken with ramipril. Make sure you have discussed any medications you are currently taking or plan to take before starting ramipril with your doctor and pharmacist. Before starting, stopping, or changing any medications while taking ramipril, please get the advice of your doctor or pharmacist. the following nonprescription products may interact with ramipril: aspirin and nonsteroidal a
